title: BambooHR vs Gusto
description: Compare BambooHR and Gusto across HRIS capabilities, payroll, applicant tracking, performance management, and benefits administration.
verdict: BambooHR wins for growing organizations that need a full-featured HRIS with built-in applicant tracking, performance management, and detailed reporting. Its employee record depth, org charts, and compensation tracking make it the better choice for companies scaling beyond 50 employees. Gusto shines with a simpler, more affordable payroll-first approach and excellent benefits administration, making it ideal for small businesses that prioritize payroll ease and transparent pricing. If your primary need is payroll and benefits, Gusto is outstanding; if you need a complete HR platform, BambooHR is the winner.

faqs.question: Can BambooHR or Gusto handle multi-state payroll?
faqs.answer: Both platforms support multi-state payroll and tax filing, automatically handling state-specific tax rates, forms, and compliance requirements. BambooHR's payroll is more customizable for complex pay structures, while Gusto excels at simplifying multi-state onboarding for small businesses.

faqs.question: Which platform is better for hiring and recruiting?
faqs.answer: BambooHR has a significant advantage with its built-in applicant tracking system that manages job postings, candidate tracking, and offer letters. Gusto does not include an ATS, requiring integration with third-party tools like Lever or Greenhouse for recruiting needs.

faqs.question: How do the pricing structures compare?
faqs.answer: Gusto offers clearer, more transparent pricing with plans starting at a per-person monthly rate that includes payroll, benefits, and basic HR features. BambooHR typically costs more and requires a quote for most plans, but includes more HR features at the base price level.

faqs.question: Is one platform better for international contractors?
faqs.answer: Gusto has stronger international contractor support, allowing US companies to pay contractors in over 80 countries with compliant tax forms and payment processing. BambooHR focuses primarily on US employees and requires additional services for international contractor management.
